chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الصَّلَاةِ عَلَى النَّبِيِّ مُحَمَّدٍ وَ أَهْلِ بَيْتِهِ عَلَيْهِمُ السَّلَامُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 20 – The Salawāt (Blessings) upon the Prophet Muhammad<sup>saww</sup> and the People<sup>asws</sup> of his<sup>saww</sup> Household

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (12/99)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (12/99)
text: سَمِعْتُهُ يَقُولُ قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) ارْفَعُوا أَصْوَاتَكُمْ بِالصَّلَاةِ عَلَيَّ فَإِنَّهَا تَذْهَبُ بِالنِّفَاقِ .

en.hubeali: Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Abdullah Bin Sinan,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws, said, ‘I heard himasws saying: ‘Rasool-Allahsaww said: ‘You should be raising your voices with the Salawāt upon mesaww, for it would remove the hypocrisy’.
en.sarwar: 13. Ibn abu ‘Umayr has narrated from ‘Abd Allah ibn Sinan who has said the following: “I heard abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) saying, ‘The Messenger of Allah has said, “Raise your voices with al-Salat (asking from Allah favors for me); it removes hypocrisy.’”
